summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Just Management hospitality dashboard. All 11 new sidebar pages implemented and working correctly. All navigation links functional. Button gaps wired correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Loading skeletons implemented consistently across all pages
Property filters work correctly on applicable pages
MOCKED DATA: Dining & Events, Staff & Roles, Security & Access, and Billing & Invoices use frontend-generated mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 new pages tested and working: Check-in/Check-out, Room Types, Availability, Housekeeping, Dining & Events, Rate Manager, Billing & Invoices, Channel Distribution, Staff & Roles, Security & Access, VIP Guests. Sidebar navigation 11/11 passed. Collapsible sub-menus (Rooms & Suites, Guest Profiles) working. Button gaps wired: Guests Export, Rooms 'Manage Room Types' -> /rooms/types, Maintenance 'Log Issue'. Property filters functional on Check-in/out, Room Types, Availability, Housekeeping, Dining Events, Rate Manager, VIP Guests pages.

button_gaps_wired.guests_export: PASS - Export button found on /guests page
button_gaps_wired.rooms_manage_types: PASS - 'Manage Room Types' button navigates to /rooms/types
button_gaps_wired.maintenance_log_issue: PASS - 'Log Issue' button found on /maintenance page
